content:
CrossFit W.O.D
Strength:
Good Morning 8-8-8-6-6-6

Metcon:
E03:00M0Mx5 Rounds:
15 Toes To Bars
20 Plate GTOH #20/15kg
*Amrap Burpees To Plate For The remaining

CrossFit Strength
Part A:
Paused Front Squats
3-3-3-2-2-2
*2 Sec Pause At the Bottom of Each Rep

Part B:
3 SuperSets Of:
5 Weighted Pull-Ups
5 Weighted Dips

Part C:
E02:00MOMx4 Rounds:
5 SandBag Cleans #70/45kg
10 Sandbag squats
15m SandBag BearHug Carry
